reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.4: the raster paint document can now be printed. The print machinery was refactored around a shared image-based core (save_print_image / send_image_to_printer), so both the object canvas and the raster document reuse the same A4 300dpi page fit and atomic verified writes. The paint window gains Print and Print As (PDF/PNG/JPEG) with the cloud-folder warning.
